name: Endara
description: Desktop app + Rust relay that aggregates MCP servers behind one endpoint. Add GitHub, Notion, Slack, and custom servers — all clients connect to localhost:9400.

skills.name: MCP Relay
skills.description: Aggregate multiple MCP servers behind a single localhost endpoint — any AI client connects with one config entry.

skills.name: OAuth Management
skills.description: Sign in to cloud services like Linear, Slack, and Notion once — Endara manages token refresh and reconnection.

skills.name: JS Execution Mode
skills.description: Collapse 50+ tools into 3 meta-tools; the model writes JavaScript to call any combination in a single round-trip.

skills.name: Server Marketplace
skills.description: Browse and install curated MCP servers from a built-in catalog with health monitoring and live logs.
